channel.title: NAAF Parlin, SM Stratton, TM Culley, PA Guerra | PlatCOVID
channel.description: NAAF Parlin, SM Stratton, TM Culley, PA Guerra

image.title: NAAF Parlin, SM Stratton, TM Culley, PA Guerra

item.title: A laboratory-based study examining the properties of silk fabric to evaluate its potential as a protective barrier for personal protective equipment and as a functional material for face coverings during the COVID-19 pandemic.
